rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.073, which governs internal audit procedures for a state department.
quote: Sec. 2306.073. INTERNAL AUDIT. (a) The director, with the approval of the board, shall appoint an internal auditor who reports directly to the board and serves at the pleasure of the board.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns internal audit governance and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
